title: NEW Integrations: Ms Teams & Google Sheets
excerpt:
We’re excited to share with you that we’ve just released two new integrations that we worked on during our integration hackathon!:tada: 
 
With our brand new MS Teams integration, you are now able to instantly turn updat…

posts.author: shelly-monday.com (Shelly Gross)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to share with you that we’ve just released two new integrations that we worked on during our integration hackathon!


With our brand new MS Teams integration, you are now able to instantly turn updates, new items and changes from a specific item into messages in MS Teams so everyone will have the most up to date information and be able to work from both platforms and stay synchronized!

To learn more check this great article


With a simple click, you can now import all your Google Sheets projects into your monday.com account!
To access this import, go to the avatar icon at the bottom left of your screen > select Import Data. From this menu, click on Google Sheets. That’s it!

To learn more check out this great article

Stay tuned for more exciting news!!

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great to hear.

Are you not using the “What’s New” feature in the Monday.com desktop app to make these announcements anymore?

There have been no updates in my “What’s New” feed for weeks but I’m finding random announcements about new and updated features here and on Facebook.

Is there a reliable single source to go to for these announcements?

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I second this +1.
Please use the “what’s new” feature in monday.com. It’s been quite depressing not seeing the red dot as frequently

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jaewoo:

not seeing the red dot

Lights up my day and gets me excited when I get to work and see the red dot waiting for me.

When we first joined Monday.com, there was a red dot every week. There’s been a drought of red dots lately.

How about it Monday.com?

posts.author: Franco (Franco Wiltink)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed we can only send updates to the “general” channel
I created a channel specialy for the monday updates but it is not updating.
Is this correct or a bug ?

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Franco

If this setback has persisted, send us an email to support@monday.com so we can take a closer look

posts.author: ceej (CJ Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Was this integration removed? I cannot find any references to the Sheets Integration mentioned in the Import article, and support told me to buy Zapier when I emailed about being unable to follow the import tutorial?
